title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!
